dimensions.evidence: scorer_test.go contains zero of the 5 required tests: grep for 'TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA', 'TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored', 'TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks', 'TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected', 'TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported' — none found.
No citation is possible because no existing symbol satisfies the plan; the required test functions do not exist anywhere in scorer_test.go.

All 5 plan tests remain unimplemented — the existing tests (e.g., TestScorer_OnlyMeasuredDimensionsPresent at line ~38) address different concerns (dimension presence from evidence type), not unsupported-language N/A, unmeasured-complexity guard, TierGeneric defaults, or aggregate skipping.

failureReasons: None of the 5 plan-required test functions exist in scorer_test.go: TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA, TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored, TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks, TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected, and TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported are all absent.

The agency claimed the project ALREADY satisfies the plan, but the plan's entire deliverable (5 new test functions) is unimplemented — the file contains only pre-existing tests covering different scenarios (e.g., TestScorer_AllClean, TestScorer_ComplexityBoostsMaintainability) none of which match the plan's required assertions about unsupported languages, unmeasured complexity guards, or TierGeneric default-injection prevention.
